query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(DISTINCT category) as categories,
  MIN(createdAt) as oldest,
  MAX(createdAt) as newest
FROM knowledge;

  COUNT(DISTINCT category) as categories,
  MIN(createdAt) as oldest,
